summary: Iteration 166 - Verified all requested features: 1) Birthday engine includes box_builder_link in WhatsApp/email templates, 2) CelebratePage handles ?build_box=birthday URL param to auto-open OccasionBoxBuilder, 3) Mobile touch targets (44px min) for Navbar menu and cart buttons, 4) SoulExplainerVideo close button has 48px touch target, 5) All pillar pages have ServiceCatalogSection, 6) Backend APIs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: birthday_engine.py: box_builder_link correctly added to WhatsApp message (line 414) and email template (lines 465-471)
CelebratePage.jsx: URL param handler for ?build_box correctly implemented (lines 45-58)
Navbar.jsx: Mobile menu button has min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] (line 889), Cart button has min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] (line 873)
SoulExplainerVideo.jsx: Close button has w-12 h-12 min-w-[48px] min-h-[48px] (line 177) - exceeds 44px requirement
All 13 pillar pages have ServiceCatalogSection imported and used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Dashboard page causes browser crashes due to large bundle - this is an environmental limitation. SoulExplainerVideo close button verified via code review (48px touch target).

birthday_engine_box_link.details: box_builder_link added to WhatsApp message template (line 414) and email HTML template (lines 465-471) with URL format: https://thedoggycompany.in/celebrate?build_box={occasion_type}

celebrate_page_url_param.details: ?build_box=birthday URL param auto-opens OccasionBoxBuilder modal with Birthday Box template. Tested via Playwright - modal opens correctly.

mobile_menu_touch_target.details: Mobile menu button measured at 44px x 44px via Playwright bounding box. Code has min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] classes.

cart_button_touch_target.details: Cart button measured at 44px x 44px via Playwright bounding box. Code has min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] classes.

soul_explainer_close_button.details: Close button has w-12 h-12 (48px) with min-w-[48px] min-h-[48px] and touch-manipulation class. Could not test via Playwright due to dashboard crash.

pillar_pages_service_catalog.details: All 13 pillar pages have ServiceCatalogSection: AdoptPage, AdvisoryPage, CarePage, CelebratePage, DinePage, EmergencyPage, EnjoyPage, FarewellPage, FitPage, LearnPage, PaperworkPage, StayPage, TravelPage

api_verification.GET /api/occasion-boxes/by-occasion/gotc: 200 OK - Returns gotcha day box template
